---
description: "Use when creating or editing requirements, architecture, implementation plans, and diagram documentation in this repository."
name: "Documentation Writing Standards"
applyTo: "**/*.md"
---
# Documentation Standards

- Keep content actionable and implementation-oriented.
- Use section order: context, design or plan details, validation or outcomes.
- Prefer numbered steps for execution flows and rollout sequences.
- Use consistent Azure service names and avoid ambiguous abbreviations.
- Keep lists concise and avoid duplicated statements across documents.
- When adding a new primary document, add a link in REQUIREMENTS.md.

## Diagram Rules

- Use Mermaid for architecture diagrams unless another format is explicitly requested.
- Include a short notes section below each diagram explaining data flow and operational intent.

## Quality Checks

- Confirm Markdown renders cleanly.
- Confirm headings are unique and meaningful.
- Confirm internal links point to existing files.
